pageTitle: Become a Corporate Partner | Support Us | Dove Cottage
metaDescription: Become a corporate partner with Dove Cottage and support local families through fundraising, volunteering, sponsorship, and payroll giving.
heroImageAlt: Supporter recognition board displaying local business and community partner logos
intro: A partnership with Dove Cottage offers numerous benefits for your organisation.
visionBody: A partnership with Dove Cottage offers numerous benefits for your organisation: Enhanced Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR): Demonstrate your commitment to the local community and make a positive impact.
whatWeDoBody: Increased Brand Awareness: Gain exposure through our marketing channels and events. Employee Engagement: Boost morale and create team-building opportunities through fundraising and volunteering. Positive PR: Enhance your company's reputation and attract customers who value social responsibility. Networking Opportunities: Connect with other businesses and community leaders.
missionParagraphs: A fun fact about corporate fundraising is that it often boosts employee morale as much as it raises money. Supporting a good cause can strengthen teams while making a real difference in the community.
There are many meaningful and flexible ways your organisation can support Dove Cottage Day Hospice.
Some examples are given below however this is not an exhaustive list! We encourage you to suggest your own ideas that are bespoke to your particular company / industry.
waysTitle: Ways your organisation can support us

ways.title: Support our fundraising campaigns and initiatives
ways.body: Partner with us to help maximise donations and impact of initiatives.

ways.title: Host fundraising events
ways.body: Organise events on our behalf to engage your team and customers.

ways.title: Sponsored challenges
ways.body: Take part in organised events, often with free or reduced entry fees available.

ways.title: Matched giving
ways.body: Support your employees fundraising efforts by offering to match the total amount raised.

ways.title: Gifts in kind
ways.body: Donate items that can be used for fundraising activities or patient care.

ways.title: Volunteer days
ways.body: Offer staff volunteering opportunities to support our hospice and activities.

donations.title: Host a donation station
donations.body: encourage employees to bring in items suitable for re-sale through our charity shops.

donations.title: Venue support
donations.body: Provide space for Dove Cottage events, helping us reduce costs and expand our reach.

donations.title: Guest speaking opportunities
donations.body: Share your expertise, interests or experiences with our patients, volunteers or supporters.

donations.title: Factory or site visits
donations.body: Host visits for our volunteers as part of our enrichment programme.

volunteeringBody: Payroll giving enables employees to donate regularly through their salaries. You can also encourage participation in our 500 Club Lottery as a regular giving option.
sponsorshipBody: There are many other ways you can support our cause, including sponsorship opportunities and joining our Business Club!
expectIntro: Download the attached leaflet for more information and ideas.
expectations: Payroll giving: Enable employees to donate regularly through their salaries
500 Club Lottery: Encourage participation in our regular giving lottery

Hands holding a heart representing compassionate care

ctaBody: To speak to someone in more detail please complete the enquiry form or call 01949 860303 and speak to the fundraising team.
